news_items.title: Countdown begins to Hull local elections
news_items.description: The pre-election period is now underway, running from the publication of Notice of Election to the close of polls at 10pm on Thursday 7 May.

news_items.title: Stronger rights for private renters
news_items.description: Private renters in Hull and across the country are to benefit from enhanced rights, which come into force from Friday 1 May. The new Renters’ Rights Act aims to give tenants more confidence to challenge poor practice, making renting fairer, and tenancies more stable. Find out more from this article and seek advice if your new tenancy rights are being affected.

news_items.title: Hull Local Plan
news_items.description: Following Government changes to the planning system, the Council has published a revised timetable for production of the new Hull Local Plan. We will be holding our next public consultation in July.

news_items.title: Financial help and support
news_items.description: With so many forms, rules and systems it can be difficult to know where to begin, but there is free, confidential advice available which is easily accessed and can help make a difference.
